name: Goblet Squat
instructions: Hold one dumbbell vertically against your chest, elbows pointing down. Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out. Brace your core. Squat down by bending your knees and hips, keeping the chest up and the weight close to your body. Go as low as you can without rounding your lower back, ideally until your thighs are at least parallel to the floor. Drive through your heels to stand up.
form_cues: Knees track over the second toe
Weight distributed evenly across both feet
Keep the dumbbell touching your sternum throughout
safety_notes: If you feel knee pain, reduce depth and use a box as a target. Do not let your heels rise. Stop immediately if you feel sharp pain in the lower back.
source: Adapted from ExRx.net and personal trainer knowledge
